metadata.name: Portainer CE
metadata.description: Helm chart for Portainer Community Edition, a web-based container management platform for Docker and Kubernetes environments.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Helm chart for Portainer Community Edition, a web-based container management platform for Docker and Kubernetes environments.

## Prerequisites
- Decide how Portainer should be exposed in-cluster and whether persistence should be chart-managed or backed by an existing PVC.
- If you plan to manage external Docker or Kubernetes endpoints, prepare the Portainer Agent or edge connectivity separately.
- Have your ingress hostname and TLS plan ready before enabling Traefik exposure.

## Deploy
- Render `values.yaml`, review the service, ingress, and persistence settings, then install or update the release with `helm upgrade --install`.
- Wait until the Portainer pod is ready and the service or ingress responds successfully.

## Post-Install
- Complete the initial admin setup flow, then add the target environments you want Portainer to manage.
- Confirm the persistent volume stays attached across a pod restart before relying on the instance.
- If you expose Portainer publicly, verify TLS and restrict access before adding production endpoints.

## References
- [Portainer](https://www.portainer.io/)
- [Documentation](https://docs.portainer.io/)
- [Helm Chart](https://portainer.github.io/k8s/)
